_publications._publicationTitle: Medium throughput biochemical compound screening identifies novel agents for pharmacotherapy of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Exposure to Nifedipine significantly attenuated S462TY xenograft growth as indicated by tumor volume (~492.06 mm 3 versus ~1638.13 mm 3 in control group at study termination, p = 0.029)
details: Nifedipine at 50 mg/kg/day significantly attenuated S462TY xenograft growth with tumor volume ~492.06 mm³ versus ~1638.13 mm³ in control group (p=0.029)
